name: Grazdan (spiked beard)
sentence: A Good Master of Astapor with a distinctive spiked beard who negotiates the sale of Unsullied to Daenerys.

name: Hareth (Mole's Town)
sentence: A stablehand from Mole's Town who sought to join the Night's Watch and was trained as a recruit at Castle Black.

name: Henly (Ashford)
sentence: A stableman in the town of Ashford during Daeron II's reign who purchased the horse Sweetfoot from Ser Duncan the Tall.

name: Hero
sentence: An Unsullied warrior who served as second-in-command of Daenerys's Unsullied forces after Grey Worm.

name: Hero (dog)
sentence: A dog that belonged to Podrick Payne when he was young; mentioned as a good dog in a brief childhood memory.

name: Jez
sentence: A dog owned by Ramsay Bolton, one of the bastard's girls.

name: Jez (serving girl)
sentence: A serving girl at Winterfell who was replaced by spearwives disguised as servants after Ramsay Bolton's wedding.

name: Justin Massey (Milk-Eye)
sentence: An ancient pirate-king of House Massey who fought a war over Massey's Hook against Storm King Erich VII Durrandon during the Andal invasion.

name: Kennet (Flea Bottom)
sentence: A man from Flea Bottom who fought for Stannis Baratheon at the Battle of the Blackwater, where he was killed on the bridge of ships.

name: Lanna (Happy Port)
sentence: A fourteen-year-old prostitute at the Happy Port brothel in Braavos with long golden hair and high market value.

name: Lanna (Peach)
sentence: A serving wench and prostitute at the Peach inn in Stoney Sept in the Riverlands.

name: Lem (Standfast)
sentence: A peasant of House Osgrey who survived the Blackfyre Rebellion and was called to defend his lands against House Webber.
